phase_name: v3.0 Auth Overhaul — Architecture Review + Planning

completed_tasks.name: Fable 5 gap analysis: v3.0 plan vs urknall feedback

Spike findings updated (callback URI production design)
STATE.md updated with all new decisions

GitHub Issues reviewed — no action needed

human_actions_pending.action: Wait for urknall's response to auth architecture reply (#175)
human_actions_pending.context: Key question: go-librespot as backend replacement — audio pipeline maturity? PKCE-first vs ZeroConf-first gaps?

human_actions_pending.action: Wait for plasticator2's response on normalization fix (#105)
human_actions_pending.context: v2.3.8 shipped with fix, waiting for user verification

decisions.rationale: Clean break, one flow covers everything, user already in browser for Settings

decisions.decision: ZeroConf stays as guest-discovery feature only
decisions.rationale: urknall Variant D adopted, mDNS for household casting, not for auth

decisions.decision: Discovery ON by default, --disable-discovery as option
decisions.rationale: Existing users' speakers must stay visible on upgrade

decisions.decision: Callback URI via GitHub Pages static relay
decisions.rationale: stiefenm.github.io/spoton/auth/ — state parameter carries LMS callback URL + nonce, zero infrastructure
Map Keymaster service calls vs client-ID-as-identity, evaluate go-librespot as backend replacement
TOTP secrets rotate, graceful degradation required
Login5 gets immediate 429 on api.spotify.com, librespot handles it internally for session ops
ToS risk, unnecessary with Extended Quota, 127.0.0.1 UX problem

decisions.decision: urknall's 11 success criteria as v3.0 UAT gates
decisions.rationale: Central criterion: no hm://keymaster/token/authenticated in normal logs

next_action: Wait for urknall's response to #175 (go-librespot evaluation question). Then /gsd-plan-phase 49-00 to start the Token Usage Audit + Backend Evaluation.
context_notes: Major session: analyzed urknall's 4 massive forum posts against our v3.0 plan with Fable 5. Found 3 conflicts (ZeroConf removal, discovery default, bootstrap priority) and 4 gaps (audit, sp_dc fragility, multi-pool routing, importer rate test). All resolved — ROADMAP rewritten. Callback URI architecture decided (GitHub Pages static relay with state parameter). Forum reply posted as #175 with two open questions to urknall. Triage clean — no pending items.
